tweelix.mining_tweaks.anti_over_mining.m: [Mining Cooldown] Please wait before mining again
tweelix.message.position.fallback: Target has no position info, copied player position instead
tweelix.config.generic.comment.openConfi: Keybind to open the mod configuration GUI
tweelix.config.generic.comment.visitorMo: Prevent breaking/placing blocks and damaging entities
tweelix.personal_config.visitor_mode.com: Show prompts when actions are blocked by Visitor Mode
tweelix.config.generic.comment.crosshair: Copy the registry name, display name, or position of the target
tweelix.personal_config.target_copy.name: Default Copy Mode
tweelix.personal_config.target_copy.comm: Set which part of the target info to copy by default: ID, display name, or position
tweelix.personal_config.target_copy.name: Send All Copyable Info
tweelix.personal_config.target_copy.comm: Display all copyable target info in chat
tweelix.config.tweaks.comment.perimeterW: When not sneaking, blocks below the configured blocks cannot be mined. Useful for keeping walls flat when manually digging out perimeters.
tweelix.personal_config.perimeter_wall_d: Configure which blocks act as the outline
tweelix.config.tweaks.comment.flatDigger: When not sneaking, maintain a flat horizontal plane while mining, preventing blocks below your feet from being broken.
tweelix.config.tweaks.comment.miningCool: Remove the default 5gt mining cooldown in Survival mode.
tweelix.config.tweaks.comment.antiOverMi: Limit mining speed to prevent over-mining.
tweelix.personal_config.anti_over_mining: Configure the cooldown time after mining (in ticks).
Show prompts during the anti-over-mining cooldown.
tweelix.config.generic.comment.defaultPr: Provide a default value for features without individual prompt toggles.
tweelix.visitor_mode.need_empty_hand_dec: Please use empty hand to interact with decorated pot
tweelix.config.tweaks.comment.drawBedroc: Render the single-layer bedrock ceiling in the Nether.
tweelix.config.display.comment.drawBedro: Render the single-layer bedrock ceiling in the Nether.
tweelix.config.display.comment.enableGam:
Allows opening the game mode switcher in Survival mode. Executes custom commands when lacking permissions.
Adventure/Spectator modes can switch to Visitor Mode/Free Camera.
When you have permissions but need to execute custom commands, you can use the spacebar to select.
tweelix.personal_config.enable_game_mode: Command to execute when selecting Creative mode with F3+F4.
Command to execute when selecting Survival mode with F3+F4.
Command to execute when selecting Adventure mode with F3+F4. If empty, defaults to switching to Visitor Mode.
Command to execute when selecting Spectator mode with F3+F4. If empty, defaults to switching to Free Camera.
tweelix.config.tweaks.comment.freeCamera: Similar to vanilla Spectator mode. Middle-click to enter entity perspective.
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.name: Hide Player
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.comm: Whether to hide the player model in Free Camera mode.
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.name: Hide Hotbar
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.comm: Whether to hide the hotbar HUD in Free Camera mode.
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.name: Hide Status Bars
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.comm: Whether to hide status bar HUD (health, hunger, etc.) in Free Camera mode.
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.name: Hide Hands
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.comm: Whether to hide the player's arm rendering in Free Camera mode.
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.name: Allow Player Interaction
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.comm: Whether the player entity can still attack or place blocks while in Free Camera mode.
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.name: Damping Coefficient
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.comm: The closer the value is to 1, the more slippery (less damping).
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.name: Sprint Multiplier
Acceleration
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.comm: The proportion of speed increase per tick, determines responsiveness.
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.name: Base Max Speed
tweelix.personal_config.free_camera.comm: Maximum movement speed in normal state (blocks/tick).
tweelix.config.display.comment.lanPortRe: Add a refresh button to the Open to LAN screen for finding available ports.
